step1.title: Basic Info
step1.heading: Tell us about yourself.
step1.ageGate: I am 18 years of age or older
step1.ageGateWarning: Listeners under 18 require verified parental consent. This feature is coming soon.

step2.title: Your Profile
step2.heading: Make it yours.
step2.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a bit about yourself. No links to other platforms, no contact info, no inappropriate language.

step3.title: Topics
step3.heading: Your comfort zones.
step3.avoid: Topics I prefer not to discuss
step3.lived: Topics I have direct lived experience with

step4.title: Languages
step4.heading: What languages do you speak?
step4.missingLanguage: Don't see your language? We can add it. Submit a support ticket after completing registration.

step5.title: Verify
step5.heading: Almost there.
step5.checkSafety: I confirm I am not homicidal, suicidal, or an abuser of others.
step5.checkPeerSupport: I understand Echo is peer support, not therapy. I will not provide medical or clinical advice.
step5.checkTerms: I agree to Echo's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

welcome.heading: Welcome to Echo.
welcome.body: You're almost ready. Before your first session, you must complete The Formation — Echo's listener training. It takes approximately 60 minutes. Your progress is saved. You can stop and return anytime.
